title: Personal Lab
summary: DevOps laboratory for cloud, containers, automation and safe experimentation.
description: A personal DevOps laboratory used to design, test and understand cloud infrastructure, containers, automation workflows and reproducible environments without fear of breaking things.

title: Pere Vault
summary: Personal cloud storage concept focused on control, structure and long-term reliability.
description: A personal cloud storage initiative focused on structure, controlled access, long-term reliability and practical use for personal documents, photos and shared household needs.

title: AutoGestor
summary: Internal automation-first project focused on maintainable systems.
description: An internal automation-first project focused on building maintainable systems and reducing operational overhead. The repository remains private while the application is under active development and will be evaluated for publication when ready.

title: Bench Journal
summary: Automated log collection, event classification and Excel reporting for test bench environments.
description: A Python tool that collects machine log files from SMB shares, parses relevant events, classifies them by type and generates Excel reports for test bench environments.

title: FilePilot
summary: Desktop tool for smart file operations, batch renaming and reusable workflow profiles.
description: A desktop application designed to simplify file-management workflows through batch renaming, pattern-based transformations, activity tracking and reusable naming profiles.

title: Exporter
summary: Hourly time-series data exporter from InfluxDB to S3 using the claim-check pattern, orchestrated by Airflow.
description: Hourly time-series data exporter from InfluxDB to S3 and SQS using the claim-check pattern, orchestrated by Airflow with gap detection and manifest-based idempotency.

title: AWS Cost Guardian
summary: AWS cost monitoring tool with FastAPI, PostgreSQL and Docker with threshold alerts.
description: AWS cost monitoring tool with FastAPI, PostgreSQL and Docker. Automatic ingestion via AWS Cost Explorer with threshold alerts.
